utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each of these items is fully specified with relevant details: property includes address, type, price, features, and taxes; financing includes lender, type, interest, amortization, down payment, mortgage, monthly payment, and closing costs; legal_services includes provider, scope, and costs; moving_services includes provider, service scope, and cost; setup_services includes utility setup details and total estimated cost; total_budget includes cost breakdown and summary. Therefore, all six items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final solution includes a property purchase at 128 Logan Avenue, Toronto, ON, which is a 3-bedroom semi-detached home priced at CAD $825,000. This falls under the 'purchase_properties' category in the ground-truth ratings, so I must find the corresponding property option with similar characteristics and price range. The closest match is 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD $750K, rating 6) because it is a character property within a similar budget range (upper limit of the user’s budget, 700–850K) and with similar family-oriented and workshop-friendly features. The financing used is a '5-Year Fixed' mortgage with TD Bank, which aligns most closely with the 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9) under purchase_financing. The legal provider is 'Maple Legal (MAPLE_LEGAL_BASIC)', clearly matching 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). The moving service is 'Toronto EasyMove' for a 3-bedroom home, corresponding to 'Premium Moving' (rating 9) since it offers full-service packing and setup. The setup services include basic utilities (electricity, gas, internet, water), corresponding to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9) because of inclusion of high-speed internet and comprehensive setup rather than minimal 'Basic Utilities'.
